Please review this Python change for our user-search endpoint:

```python
@app.get('/users/search')
def search_users(q: str):
    conn = db.get_conn()
    cur = conn.cursor()
    cur.execute(f"SELECT id, email FROM users WHERE name LIKE '%{q}%'")
    return [{'id': r[0], 'email': r[1]} for r in cur.fetchall()]
```

Review this Bash script added to our deploy pipeline:

```bash
#!/bin/bash
USER_INPUT=$1
LOG_DIR=/var/log/deploy
mkdir -p $LOG_DIR
echo "Deploying $USER_INPUT" > $LOG_DIR/deploy.log
eval "kubectl apply -f manifests/$USER_INPUT.yaml"
```
